backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Campus Circular Mart backend, defining Listing and UserProfile types with CRUD operations for listings and user profiles, protected by role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (authentication, browse page, post listing form, listing detail) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, hooks, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (background, foreground, primary, etc.) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Campus Circular Mart', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Browse, Post Listing, My Listings, and Listing Detail pages, wrapped in a Layout that includes Navbar, Footer, ProfileSetupModal, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Auth gate component that renders a styled 'Students Only' login prompt with an Internet Identity login button when the user is unauthenticated, otherwise renders its children.
frontend/src/components/CategoryBadge.ts: Pill-shaped badge component that displays a color-coded label for each of the six listing categories (textbooks, electronics, clothing, furniture, stationery, other).
frontend/src/components/EmptyState.tsx: Centered empty state UI component with a configurable icon (box or search), heading, and optional description for displaying when no listings are available.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer displaying the app name, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/ListingCard.tsx: Clickable card component that displays a listing's image (or placeholder), title, seller name, price, and category badge in a hover-animated card layout.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with logo, nav links, and auth controls (login/logout) using Internet Identity; supports mobile menu toggle and displays the authenticated user's display name.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter a display name, then saves their profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout state, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions: fetching/saving user profiles and fetching, creating, and deleting marketplace listings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, applies Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the campus-green light/dark color theme and category badge colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/BrowseListings.tsx: Browse page that displays all marketplace listings in a filterable, searchable grid with category chips, loading skeletons, and newest-first sorting.
frontend/src/pages/ListingDetail.tsx: Displays a detailed view of a single marketplace listing, including image, price, description, category, and a contact-reveal button that requires authentication via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/MyListings.tsx: Shows the authenticated user's own listings with options to view, delete (with confirmation dialog), or create new listings, wrapped in an AuthGuard.
frontend/src/pages/PostListing.tsx: Provides a form for authenticated users to create a new listing with title, description, price, category, and an optional image that is resized and stored as a base64 data URL.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (campus, category, semantic), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Defines the project state for Campus Circular Mart, a second-hand marketplace for college students, including feature list, architectural notes, image requirements, and known issues.
